lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Inara — Commodities
sources.what: Commodity demand and sell prices, mining-module sellers, and trade hubs.

sources.label: Fandom — Miner
sources.what: Mining methods, extraction-tool roles, and the mining-career rank ladder.

sources.label: Fandom — Hotspot
sources.what: Ring-type, hotspot, and pristine-reserve mechanics plus mineral identities.

sources.label: edtools.cc — Hotspot Finder
sources.what: Searchable hotspot/ring database (icy/rocky/metallic, pristine systems, overlap density).

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: Laser-mining tutorial: finding rings and hotspots, prospecting, mining lasers, collecting fragments, refining, and selling.

sources.label: YouTube — Mile 13 Gaming
sources.what: Core-mining tutorial: locating fissured asteroids, placing seismic charges, cracking cores, and extracting opals and diamonds.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Ring-mining credit guide: where to mine and how to maximise profit per session.
